topics.title: Income Tax filing (ITR)
topics.summary: Individuals must file ITR by 31 July following the end of the financial year (FY) ending 31 March. Belated returns allowed up to 31 Dec with penalty under Section 234F.

topics.title: New Tax Regime — FY 2025-26
topics.summary: Revised slabs announced in Budget 2025: 0% up to ₹4L, 5% to ₹8L, 10% to ₹12L, 15% to ₹16L, 20% to ₹20L, 25% to ₹24L, 30% above. Standard deduction ₹75,000. 87A rebate covers taxable income up to ₹12L.

topics.title: Section 80C deductions (Old regime only)
topics.summary: Up to ₹1.5L on EPF, PPF, ELSS, LIC, home-loan principal, tuition fees etc. Does not apply to the new regime.

topics.title: TDS & Form 16
topics.summary: Employers deduct TDS monthly and issue Form 16 by 15 June. Mismatch with Form 26AS is the most common ITR rejection cause.

topics.title: GST
topics.summary: Consumption tax on goods & services. Standard rates: 5%, 12%, 18%, 28%. Mandatory registration above ₹40L turnover (services: ₹20L).
